title: oldenlandia arborea
intro: Oldenlandia arborea, also known as Tie Guan Yin or Chinese Eupatorium, is a flowering plant species native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia arborea include reducing fever and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or capsules for its various health benefits.
